summary: Resolved the DinoBrain data repo untracked backlog. Classified 1640 existing untracked files with git_sync as conditional/requires_review with zero sensitive-pattern findings, staged the backlog, committed it as data: commit conditional backlog records, and prepared the remaining current-task records for a final cleanup commit.
decisions: Use DinoBrain git_sync and public-data safety checks as the truth surface before committing the backlog.
Commit conditional backlog records because the user explicitly requested resolving the old data repo untracked backlog and git_sync reported no blocked or sensitive-pattern files.
Keep raw local-only paths out of the commit; the backlog did not include raw transcript paths because .gitignore excludes them.
Handle current prompt artifacts in a separate final cleanup commit after finish_task.
next_steps: Push the backlog commit and final task-trace cleanup commit to origin/main.
If warning count from public-data safety remains high, treat it as tracked conditional review-queue visibility rather than untracked backlog.
